service.name: Adyen API
service.description_for_ai: Enterprise global payments platform. Used by Uber, Spotify, Microsoft, McDonald. 200+ payment methods, 40+ currencies. Unified commerce across online, mobile, POS. Use for large-scale global payment processing.

auth.how_to_get: Adyen Customer Area → Developers → API credentials

capabilities.description_for_ai: Enterprise global payments platform. Used by Uber, Spotify, Microsoft, McDonald. 200+ payment methods, 40+ currencies. Unified commerce across online, mobile, POS. Use for large-scale global payment processing. Process payment with card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, local payment methods. Enterprise-grade checkout.
